endpoints.name: Get GIFs by ID
endpoints.description: A multiget version of the get GIF by ID endpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Random GIF
endpoints.description: Returns a random GIF, limited by tag. Excluding the tag parameter will return a random GIF from the GIPHY catalog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search GIFs
endpoints.description: Search all GIPHY GIFs for a word or phrase. Punctuation will be stripped and ignored.  Use a plus or url encode for phrases. Example paul+rudd, ryan+gosling or american+psycho.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Translate phrase to GIF
endpoints.description: The translate API draws on search, but uses the GIPHY `special sauce` to handle translating from one vocabulary to another. In this case, words and phrases to GIF
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Trending GIFs
endpoints.description: Fetch GIFs currently trending online. Hand curated by the GIPHY editorial team.  The data returned mirrors the GIFs showcased on the GIPHY homepage. Returns 25 results by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get GIF by Id
endpoints.description: Returns a GIF given that GIF's unique ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY. Replace {{GIFID}} with a real gifid.

endpoints.name: Random Sticker
endpoints.description: Returns a random GIF, limited by tag. Excluding the tag parameter will return a random GIF from the GIPHY catalog.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Search Stickers
endpoints.description: Replicates the functionality and requirements of the classic GIPHY search, but returns animated stickers rather than GIFs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Translate phrase to Sticker
endpoints.description: The translate API draws on search, but uses the GIPHY `special sauce` to handle translating from one vocabulary to another. In this case, words and phrases to GIFs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Trending Stickers
endpoints.description: Fetch Stickers currently trending online. Hand curated by the GIPHY editorial team. Returns 25 results by default.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GIPHY_API_KEY}} with your GIPHY API KEY.
